+            },
+            new()
+            {
+                Id = 6, DepartmentId = 2, Code = "MATH 201", Title = "Linear Algebra",
+                Description = "Vector spaces, linear transformations, matrices, determinants, and eigenvalues.",
+                Credits = 3, Schedule = "Tue/Thu 9:00–10:20 AM", IsFeatured = false,
+                InstructorName = "Dr. Emily Zhao",

+
+    public List<Course> GetFeaturedCourses() => _courses.Where(c => c.IsFeatured).ToList();
+
+    public List<Course> GetCoursesByDepartment(int departmentId) =>
+        _courses.Where(c => c.DepartmentId == departmentId).ToList();
+
+    public Course? GetCourse(int id) => _courses.FirstOrDefault(c => c.Id == id);
+
+    public List<Course> SearchCourses(string? searchTerm, int? departmentId)
+    {
+        var query = _courses.AsEnumerable();
+
+        if (departmentId.HasValue && departmentId.Value > 0)
+            query = query.Where(c => c.DepartmentId == departmentId.Value);
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))

+            var term = searchTerm.Trim();
+            query = query.Where(c =>

+                c.Description.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||

+    }
+
+    public string GetDepartmentName(int departmentId) =>
+        _departments.FirstOrDefault(d => d.Id == departmentId)?.Name ?? "Unknown";
+}

Departments

data.content:
The Blazor Web App is complete and verified. Here's what was built:

**Project: `UniversityCourseCatalog`** (Static SSR Blazor — no SignalR/WebSocket needed)

**Pages:**
- **`/`** — Homepage with featured courses and department links
- **`/courses`** — Searchable, filterable course list (by text and department)
- **`/courses/{id}`** — Course detail (description, schedule, credits, instructor bio + enroll link)
- **`/departments`** — Department listing
- **`/departments/{id}`** — Department detail with its courses
- **`/enroll`** — Enrollment request form (name, student ID, course dropdown) with validation and confirmation

**Key files:**
- `Models/` — `Department`, `Course`, `EnrollmentRequest` (with `DataAnnotations` validation)
- `Services/CatalogService` — In-memory data service with 5 departments, 13 courses, search/filter
- `Components/Pages/` — 6 Razor pages + layout/nav

Build: **0 errors, 0 warnings**. All routes verified via `curl`.
